ValidationRule.description: Enforce that Name matches the prefix for the selected Type: role-*, core-skill-*, skill-*, workflow-*.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND(TEXT(Type__c) = "Role", NOT(BEGINS(Name, "role-"))), AND(TEXT(Type__c) = "Core_Skill", NOT(BEGINS(Name, "core-skill-"))), AND(TEXT(Type__c) = "Skill", NOT(BEGINS(Name, "skill-"))), AND(TEXT(Type__c) = "Workflow", NOT(BEGINS(Name, "workflow-"))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Name must match the Type prefix: role- for Role, core-skill- for Core Skill, skill- for Skill, workflow- for Workflow.
